title: Onyx
description: A featureful Fabric client modpack focused on performance and stability.
body:
**Onyx is a featureful Fabric client modpack designed to improve Minecraft performance, stability, and responsiveness while preserving the vanilla experience.**

It builds on Opal but adds quality-of-life and visual client improvements such as HUD enhancements, zoom, and shader support. Designed for systems with higher performance headroom, Onyx delivers extra functionality without unnecessary overhead.

Players who prefer a strictly performance-only experience can use [Opal](https://modrinth.com/modpack/opal-client-pack), the lightweight version.


в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Key Features
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

вЂў Significant performance improvements over vanilla  
вЂў Reduced memory usage and smoother gameplay  
вЂў Quality-of-life enhancements (HUD, zoom, etc)  
вЂў Fabric-based and multiplayer-safe  
вЂў Optimised to minimise performance impact

If you want only performance related features or are using a very low-end system, consider using [Opal](https://modrinth.com/modpack/opal-client-pack), which is the optimised base for a smoother experience.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Testing
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

**Tested on a laptop running Windows 11. Specs include:**
- Intel Core i5-1135G7 CPU
- Intel Iris Xe Graphics
- 8GB RAM (2GB Allocated)

Achieved average frame rate between 400 - 450 in different scenarios including world generation (fps is capped at 120 in game)


**Tested on a chromebook running ChromeOS. Specs include:**
- Intel Pentium Silver N5030 CPU
- Intel UHD Graphics
- 2770MB RAM (1024 Allocated, only around 800MB available)

Achieved average frame rate between 35 - 45 in normal gameplay and around 20 - 25 fps when generating the world and loading chunks

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Notes
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

вЂў Client-side only  
вЂў Works on vanilla and modded servers (where client mods are allowed)  
вЂў Resource packs and settings included are optional and can be changed freely  
вЂў Support for older versions will take longer to release as newer versions take priority

Onyx is intended to be a featureful, dependable optimisation base that you can use as-is or build on with additional mods. Backup your worlds and configs when updating. This modpack is geared towards very low-end devices and therefore I will be very selective about the mods added to keep the total amount small and easy to run.
